latestEvent.what_happened: Three more threads moved same day. Nia and Sasha had a live afternoon exchange where Sasha's "buying precision" riff landed: precision of one-breath self-articulation is what a coach is actually bought for -- MANY coaches can work with a client who brings great precision, ALMOST NO coaches can work with mediocre precision, because coaches sell the promise of client demand and every downstream tactic depends on upstream clarity. Nia replied "Yeah! Truth" -- full agreement, relationship warm. Archived verbatim in the Outreach Message Bank (tagged precision-riff / one-breath-doctrine-live / EN). Separately, Oyi messaged wanting to run people through the Top Talent test now, pre-webinar, and self-answered the flow: people take the test, download their PDF, bring the PDF to him -- no backend data needed. Read as a strong demand signal: Oyi is pulling the community-onboarding flow forward himself; the PDF flow is the free rung-1 taste, and the $1,500 dashboard/module proposal is the natural upgrade once PDF-collecting by hand gets tedious. Sasha is replying with the flow plus a soft pointer to the proposal. Also logged: Marley, a friend who delivered a stunning visualization/activation practice at the ClubDAO incubator ~3 years ago -- idea to license/feature her activation inside the digital product lineup at 15-25% revenue share (another mycelium edge); pinned as a parked, warm conversation candidate.
